name: SavvyCal
description: Drive SavvyCal (modern team scheduling) from any AI agent: scheduling links, meetings, availability. 6 tools, API-key Bearer auth.
instructions:
This connector uses the SavvyCal API v1 (developer.savvycal.com).

**Setup**:
1. Sign in to https://savvycal.com → top-right avatar → **Developer → API Keys → Create new key**.
2. Set `SAVVYCAL_API_KEY`.

**Authentication**: `Authorization: Bearer ${SAVVYCAL_API_KEY}`.

**Resource model**:
  - **Link**: a scheduling link template (`/me/intro-call`).
  - **Booking**: a scheduled meeting via a link.
  - **Calendar**: connected calendar source (Google/Outlook).

**Pagination**: cursor — response has `meta.next_cursor`.

**Out of scope here**: workflows automation editing, payments via Stripe, team round-robin config (UI-only).

tools.name: savvycal_me
tools.description: Return the user the token belongs to.

tools.name: savvycal_list_links
tools.description: List scheduling links. Each has id, slug, name, public, single_use, link_url, durations[], owner.

tools.name: savvycal_get_link
tools.description: Fetch a scheduling link by ID with full details.

tools.name: savvycal_get_meeting
tools.description: Fetch a meeting by ID with invitee details, cancellation URL, reschedule URL.

tools.name: savvycal_cancel_meeting
tools.description: Cancel a scheduled meeting. The invitee receives a cancellation email.
